---
title: "Ethan Doan"
page-layout: full
---

::: {.hero-grid}

::: {.hero-text}
#### Some area of interest

:::
<!-- 
::: {.hero-image}
![](headshots/){alt="" class="headshot"}
![](headshots/){alt="" class="fieldshot"}
:::
-->

:::

<hr class="section-divider">

::: {.content-card}
## About Me

Hi, I’m Ethan. I’m a student at William & Mary studying science, with a strong interest in biochemistry and how it connects to real-world problems. I enjoy breaking down complex ideas and understanding how things work at a deeper level.

Outside of academics, I’m always looking for ways to learn, improve, and take on new challenges. This site is a place where I share my work, interests, and things I’m building along the way.
:::

<hr class="section-divider">

::: {.content-card}
## Contact

##### Ethan Doan
 

##### Email:  
[etdoan (at) wm.edu](mailto:etdoan@wm.edu)  

---

### Find me online

- [GitHub](https://github.com/etdoan)  
:::
